subcodes.first_line: The eternal Sun hath dawned from the everlasting Orient, resplendent with divine bounty, illumining the realm of existence with worlds of light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شمس ازلی از مشرق لایزالی از عنایت ربانی مستبرق گشته و عرصه وجود عوالم نور را
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @free will and predestination; fate
